catalysts.thesis: Massive insider aggression with the CEO buying $2.5M in open market shares on April 7, 2026, signaling immense confidence ahead of upcoming earnings.
catalysts.catalyst_details: A Form 4 filed late on 2026-04-07 shows the CEO purchased 18,500 shares at an average price of $135.10, the largest open market buy from this insider in two years.
catalysts.absorption_status: Unnoticed by retail flow; stock is currently flat to +1.2% today (passes the <8% rule) due to low morning volume and lack of headline coverage.
catalysts.prediction_market: High probability of a Q1 top-line beat based on the historical track record of this specific insider's purchases.
catalysts.risk: Consumer discretionary headwinds or poor macro retail data could dampen broader sector multiples despite strong company execution.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Insider buying of this magnitude has historically preceded a 10%+ run into earnings over the last 3 years for CROX.
catalysts.x_sentiment: Virtually no mention of the Form 4 yet; highly under the radar among retail communities.

catalysts.thesis: AXSM reported positive top-line Phase 3 data for its narcolepsy pipeline on April 6, 2026, yet the stock has barely moved due to broader biotech ETF rebalancing, presenting a prime PEAD/Biotech entry.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Positive Phase 3 trial results announced on 2026-04-06. The drug candidate showed statistically significant improvement over the placebo, paving the way for an sNDA filing.
catalysts.absorption_status: Market has not priced this in; the stock is up only 2.5% today (well under the >8% filter rule) as retail volume was fully absorbed by algorithmic sector rotation and ETF outflows.
catalysts.prediction_market: 75% implied probability of FDA submission by Q3 based on historically similar clinical success rates.
catalysts.risk: The FDA could request additional long-term safety data before accepting the regulatory submission, delaying the launch timeline.
catalysts.expected_upside: +20% over the next month as sell-side analysts digest the data and update their price targets.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Historical comps with similar late-stage data readouts saw immediate 15%+ re-ratings. AXSM is lagging heavily due to macro-level sector noise.
catalysts.x_sentiment: Retail chatter is surprisingly quiet; however, institutional dark pool buying has been noted.
